scripts.dev: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/index.js
scripts.knowledge-sync: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/knowledge-sync.js
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run compile && node --test --test-concurrency=1 dist/app.test.js dist/knowledge-sync.test.js dist/knowledge.test.js dist/phase6-runner-host.scaffold.test.js
